creator: benoitc@enki-multimedia.eu
text:
I reproduced it without srv-io enabled yesterday when using vlans. Until I set it I couldn't ping any remote IPV6 nodes or use a public ip set on a vlan interface. Unfortunately I don't have any log.The symptoms where the following:


* I could ping loopback interace with an IPv6 setup
* I could *not* ping the ipv6 set o a vlan or ping remote 
* The message was present in the logs

That is a critical issue IMO.
